svg.title: Headline Macro F1 by modality, window, and setting
svg.desc: Grouped bar chart of Macro F1 for multi-faceted fusion, periocular-only, and eye-movement-only across three settings. Fusion wins at the 2.0s window and cross-session, but honestly loses at the 0.5s window (0.43 vs 0.45).

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Takeaway: fusion wins with enough temporal context — and we own the 0.5s exception.
